summary: Replayed ADR 0301 from the refreshed latest `origin/main` baseline at repository version `0.177.108`, validated the Semgrep wrapper plus the no-git snapshot path from the exact-main release candidate, and reran the authoritative remote build-server plus local pre-push gate contracts end to end before merging to `main`. Hosted verification remained externally constrained: GitHub branch pushes intentionally do not trigger `.github/workflows/validate.yml`, and the private Gitea controller at `http://100.64.0.1:3009` reset both git and HTTP/API connections during the branch-validation window.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python -m pytest -q tests/test_semgrep_gate.py tests/test_parallel_check.py tests/test_validation_lanes.py tests/test_validation_gate_windmill.py tests/test_validation_runner_contracts.py tests/test_validation_gate.py` returned `38 passed in 4.69s`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0301-mainline-targeted-pytest-r1-0.177.108.txt`.

verification.check: Exact-main Semgrep wrapper and no-git snapshot replay
verification.observed: Both `./scripts/validate_repo.sh semgrep` and the containerized no-git replay in `registry.example.com/check-runner/python:3.12.10` passed on the exact-main `0.177.108` tree, with the snapshot path explicitly recording `baseline comparison: skipped (checkout has no git metadata)`; transcripts are preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0301-mainline-validate-semgrep-r1-0.177.108.txt` and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0301-mainline-no-git-semgrep-r1-0.177.108.txt`.

`make remote-validate` and `make pre-push-gate` both passed from the exact-main `0.177.108` tree after the protected release surfaces were declared in `workstreams.yaml`; the final successful transcripts are preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0301-mainline-remote-validate-r2-0.177.108.txt` and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0301-mainline-pre-push-gate-r1-0.177.108.txt`.

Branch pushes for `codex/ws-0301-main-integration` intentionally produced no GitHub `Validate` run because `.github/workflows/validate.yml` is configured for `push` on `main` and `pull_request` only; the empty branch-run query is preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0301-mainline-github-branch-runs-r1-0.177.108.json`.

The initial authenticated branch push re-ran the already-green local pre-push hook, and the direct `--no-verify` retry plus direct controller probes (`/`, `/user/login`, `/api/swagger`, `/api/v1/version`) all failed with `Recv failure: Connection reset by peer`; the transcripts are preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0301-mainline-gitea-push-r1-0.177.108.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0301-mainline-gitea-push-r2-0.177.108.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0301-mainline-gitea-head-r1-0.177.108.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0301-mainline-gitea-api-version-r1-0.177.108.json`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0301-mainline-gitea-manual-http-r1-0.177.108.txt`.

notes: This receipt captures the exact-main branch-local validation state that was merged to `main` in repository version `0.177.108`.
The hosted GitHub and private Gitea paths were not falsely marked pass here; they were either intentionally not triggered on branch pushes or were externally unavailable during the validation window.
